ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the package */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL of the package's homepage */,
  "repository" TEXT /* URL of the package's repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required by the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports other packages */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of packages imported */,
  "import_methods_count" INTEGER /* Number of methods imported */,
  "import_classes_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes imported */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the dependency in the dependency tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that requires other packages */,
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required package */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of required packages */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement */,
  "alternative_packages" TEXT /* Alternative packages that can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_required_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "heaviness_score" INTEGER /* Heaviness score of the dependency */,
  "heaviness_type" TEXT /* Type of heaviness */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for considering a dependency heavy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-package link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the package in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "parent_role" INTEGER /* Parent role (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's role (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
